infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Veritas needs camera access to capture physically verified photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Veritas needs your location to embed GPS coordinates into photos for verification.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Veritas needs your location to embed GPS coordinates into photos for verification.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Veritas uses motion sensors to verify photo authenticity.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Veritas to access your camera to capture physically verified photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Veritas to access your location to embed GPS coordinates into photos for verification.
